text:
10th Revision, Clinical Modification/Procedure Coding System 
(ICD-10-CM/PCS) codes into clinically meaningful categories. The CCSR for ICD-10-CM diagnoses 
aggregates more than 70,000 ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes into over 530 clinical categories across 21 
body systems.
